name: adg-governance
description: Agentic Development Governance — deny-by-default, SQL-first governance for agent-assisted development. Install the plugin to gate tool use deterministically and run the ADG lane / backlog / audit workflow inside Claude Code.

plugins.name: adg-governance
plugins.description: Deterministic deny-by-default tool gating (PreToolUse hook), bounded context, a generated CLAUDE.md rulebook, and the ADG lane / backlog / audit workflow as slash commands and skills.
